---
title : "The Plain Person’s Guide to Plain Text Social Science"
date : "2018-01-01"
author : ["Kieran Healy"]
categories : ["Book"]
publication : " "
publication_short : " "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Kieran Healy (2018). *The Plain Person’s Guide to Plain Text Social Science*.  

:::
